content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "在藥房買藥",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "你好，我想要買成藥。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng yào mǎi chéng yào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 yao4 mai3 cheng2 yao4.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I want to buy some over-the-counter medicine.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 일반약을 사고 싶습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "藥師",
          "text": "你好，請問你有什麼症狀？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn nǐ yǒu shénme zhèngzhuàng?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 ni3 you3 shen2me zheng4zhuang4?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, may I ask what symptoms you have?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 어떤 증상이 있으신가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我昨天開始頭痛，還有喉嚨痛。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zuótiān kāishǐ tóutòng, hái yǒu hóulóng tòng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 zuo2tian1 kai1shi3 tou2tong4, hai2 you3 hou2long2 tong4.",
          "translation_en": "I started having a headache yesterday, and also a sore throat.",
          "translation_ko": "어제부터 두통이 있고, 목도 아픕니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "藥師",
          "text": "你有發燒嗎？要不要先量體溫？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ yǒu fāshāo ma? Yào bù yào xiān liáng tǐwēn?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 you3 fa1shao1 ma? Yao4 bu4 yao4 xian1 liang2 ti3wen1?",
          "translation_en": "Do you have a fever? Do you want to take your temperature first?",
          "translation_ko": "열이 있나요? 먼저 체온을 재보시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我沒有量，但是覺得身體很熱。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ méiyǒu liáng, dànshì juéde shēntǐ hěn rè.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 mei2you3 liang2, dan4shi4 jue2de shen1ti3 hen3 re4.",
          "translation_en": "I haven't measured it, but I feel very hot.",
          "translation_ko": "재보지는 않았는데, 몸이 많이 뜨겁습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "藥師",
          "text": "我建議你去診所看醫生。成藥可能不夠。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ jiànyì nǐ qù zhěnsuǒ kàn yīshēng. Chéng yào kěnéng bú gòu.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 jian4yi4 ni3 qu4 zhen3suo3 kan4 yi1sheng1. Cheng2 yao4 ke3neng2 bu2 gou4.",
          "translation_en": "I suggest you go to the clinic to see a doctor. Over-the-counter medicine might not be enough.",
          "translation_ko": "진료소에 가서 의사를 만나보시는 게 좋겠습니다. 일반약으로는 부족할 수 있습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好的，謝謝你。那診所在哪裡？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, xièxiè nǐ. Nà zhěnsuǒ zài nǎlǐ?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, xie4xie4 ni3. Na4 zhen3suo3 zai4 na3li3?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, thank you. Where is the clinic?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 감사합니다. 그럼 진료소는 어디에 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "藥師",
          "text": "前面左轉，走兩分鐘就到了。",
          "pinyin": "Qiánmiàn zuǒ zhuǎn, zǒu liǎng fēnzhōng jiù dào le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Qian2mian4 zuo3 zhuan3, zou3 liang3 fen1zhong1 jiu4 dao4 le.",
          "translation_en": "Turn left ahead, and it's a two-minute walk.",
          "translation_ko": "앞에서 좌회전하시면 2분 거리에 있습니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What symptoms does the customer have?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 어떤 증상이 있습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Headache and sore throat", "Stomachache and fever", "Cough and runny nose"],
          "options_ko": ["두통과 인후통", "복통과 발열", "기침과 콧물"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the pronunciation of 症狀, 發燒, and 量體溫.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Imagine you are at a pharmacy with a headache. Ask the pharmacist for advice and describe your symptoms."
    },
    {
      "title": "在診所掛號",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "護士",
          "text": "你好，請問要掛號嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, qǐng wèn yào guàhào ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, qing3 wen4 yao4 gua4hao4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Hello, would you like to register?",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 접수하시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "是的，我想要掛號。",
          "pinyin": "Shì de, wǒ xiǎng yào guàhào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Shi4 de, wo3 xiang3 yao4 gua4hao4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, I would like to register.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 접수하고 싶습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "護士",
          "text": "請問你叫什麼名字？",
          "pinyin": "Qǐng wèn nǐ jiào shénme míngzì?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Qing3 wen4 ni3 jiao4 shen2me ming2zi4?",
          "translation_en": "What is your name?",
          "translation_ko": "성함이 어떻게 되세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我叫王小明。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ jiào Wáng Xiǎomíng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 jiao4 Wang2 Xiao3ming2.",
          "translation_en": "My name is Wang Xiaoming.",
          "translation_ko": "왕샤오밍이라고 합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "護士",
          "text": "你有來過這間診所嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ yǒu lái guò zhè jiān zhěnsuǒ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 you3 lai2 guo4 zhe4 jian1 zhen3suo3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Have you been to this clinic before?",
          "translation_ko": "이 진료소에 오신 적이 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "沒有，這是第一次。",
          "pinyin": "Méiyǒu, zhè shì dì yī cì.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2you3, zhe4 shi4 di4 yi1 ci4.",
          "translation_en": "No, this is the first time.",
          "translation_ko": "아니요, 처음입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "護士",
          "text": "好的，請填一下這張表。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐng tián yīxià zhè zhāng biǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, qing3 tian2 yi1xia4 zhe4 zhang1 biao3.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, please fill out this form.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 이 서류를 작성해 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "沒問題。請問掛號費多少錢？",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí. Qǐng wèn guàhào fèi duōshǎo qián?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2. Qing3 wen4 gua4hao4 fei4 duo1shao3 qian2?",
          "translation_en": "No problem. How much is the registration fee?",
          "translation_ko": "알겠습니다. 접수비는 얼마인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "護士",
          "text": "掛號費是兩百塊。",
          "pinyin": "Guàhào fèi shì liǎng bǎi kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Gua4hao4 fei4 shi4 liang3 bai3 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "The registration fee is 200 dollars.",
          "translation_ko": "접수비는 200위안입니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "How much is the registration fee?",
          "question_ko": "접수비는 얼마입니까?",
          "options_en": ["100 dollars", "200 dollars", "300 dollars"],
          "options_ko": ["100위안", "200위안", "300위안"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the pronunciation of 掛號 and 第一次.",
      "free_response_prompt": "You are at a clinic for the first time. Practice registering with the nurse, giving your name and asking about the fee."
    },
    {
      "title": "藥師說明用藥方法",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "藥師",
          "text": "這是你的藥，請記得飯後吃。",
          "pinyin": "Zhè shì nǐ de yào, qǐng jìde fàn hòu chī.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4 shi4 ni3 de yao4, qing3 ji4de fan4 hou4 chi1.",
          "translation_en": "This is your medicine. Please remember to take it after meals.",
          "translation_ko": "이것은 당신의 약입니다. 식후에 드시는 것을 기억하세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "一天要吃幾次？",
          "pinyin": "Yì tiān yào chī jǐ cì?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Yi4 tian1 yao4 chi1 ji3 ci4?",
          "translation_en": "How many times a day should I take it?",
          "translation_ko": "하루에 몇 번 먹어야 하나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "藥師",
          "text": "一天三次，一次一顆藥丸。",
          "pinyin": "Yì tiān sān cì, yí cì yì kē yàowán.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Yi4 tian1 san1 ci4, yi2 ci4 yi4 ke1 yao4wan2.",
          "translation_en": "Three times a day, one pill each time.",
          "translation_ko": "하루 세 번, 한 번에 한 알씩 드세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我對某些藥過敏，這藥有副作用嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ duì mǒuxiē yào guòmǐn, zhè yào yǒu fù zuò yòng ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 dui4 mou3xie1 yao4 guo4min3, zhe4 yao4 you3 fu4 zuo4 yong4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "I am allergic to some medicines. Does this medicine have side effects?",
          "translation_ko": "저는 특정 약에 알레르기가 있습니다. 이 약에 부작용이 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "藥師",
          "text": "可能會有想睡覺的副作用。如果你不舒服，請停藥。",
          "pinyin": "Kěnéng huì yǒu xiǎng shuìjiào de fù zuò yòng. Rúguǒ nǐ bù shūfú, qǐng tíng yào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ke3neng2 hui4 you3 xiang3 shui4jiao4 de fu4 zuo4 yong4. Ru2guo3 ni3 bu4 shu1fu2, qing3 ting2 yao4.",
          "translation_en": "There may be a side effect of drowsiness. If you feel unwell, please stop taking it.",
          "translation_ko": "졸음이 오는 부작용이 있을 수 있습니다. 불편하시면 복용을 중단하세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好的，我了解了。謝謝你。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ liǎojiě le. Xièxiè nǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, wo3 liao3jie3 le. Xie4xie4 ni3.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I understand. Thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 알겠습니다. 감사합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "藥師",
          "text": "不客氣，祝你早日康復。",
          "pinyin": "Bú kèqì, zhù nǐ zǎorì kāngfù.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu2 ke4qi4, zhu4 ni3 zao3ri4 kang1fu4.",
          "translation_en": "You're welcome. I wish you a speedy recovery.",
          "translation_ko": "천만에요. 빨리 쾌차하시길 바랍니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "How many pills should the customer take each time?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 한 번에 몇 알을 먹어야 합니까?",
          "options_en": ["One pill", "Two pills", "Three pills"],
          "options_ko": ["한 알", "두 알", "세 알"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the pronunciation of 副作用, 過敏, and 飯後.",
      "free_response_prompt": "You are at the pharmacy receiving medicine. Ask the pharmacist about the dosage, side effects, and when to take it."
    }
  ]
}
